concerns.text: FR-001 requires preprocessing raw fMRI NIfTI files (motion correction, normalization, smoothing). The plan (P0/P1) and research.md explicitly state that verified datasets are Parquet files and raw NIfTI is missing. The plan proposes a 'Data Validation' step or simulation but lacks a concrete task to satisfy the raw data preprocessing requirement. This is an unbacked FR; the implementer has no path to execute FR-001 as specified.

SC-001 requires measuring participant exclusion rates against a motion artifact threshold (>3mm/10% volumes). Since the plan acknowledges raw fMRI data (and thus motion parameters) is likely absent from the Parquet sources, there is no corresponding plan element to calculate or measure this exclusion rate. The success criterion cannot be measured.

FR-004 mandates permutation testing with FDR correction for 'voxel-wise' inference. The plan's P4 step mentions 'Permutation testing with FDR correction' but the research.md and data-model.md indicate the data is likely ROI-level time-series (Parquet) rather than voxel-wise volumes. Without voxel-wise data, the 'voxel-wise' aspect of FR-004 is unbacked. The plan needs to explicitly address whether this FR is being downgraded to ROI-level or if a voxel-wise simulation is required.

SC-004 measures family-wise error rate against an FDR-corrected threshold. Similar to SC-001, if the data is not voxel-wise (as indicated in research.md), the specific metric for 'family-wise error' across voxels cannot be computed. The plan lacks a task to validate this specific success criterion.
